_meta.description: Collector-derived contract for the OS image Builds page.

summary_metrics.label: Pipelines with published run history
summary_metrics.derivation: Count rows whose factory-stats.json image_builds entry is non-empty.

summary_metrics.label: Runs in tracked history
summary_metrics.derivation: Sum of history_points length across all rows (capped at 20 runs per pipeline).

rows.description: Bluefin main-branch image build (published as the :stable tag).
rows.derivation: Join BUILD_PIPELINE_CATALOG with docs/data/factory-stats.json image_builds['bluefin-stable'], populated by a live GitHub Actions workflow-runs query against projectbluefin/bluefin.

rows.description: Bluefin testing-branch image build (published as the :testing tag).
rows.derivation: Join BUILD_PIPELINE_CATALOG with docs/data/factory-stats.json image_builds['bluefin-testing'], populated by a live GitHub Actions workflow-runs query against projectbluefin/bluefin.
Join BUILD_PIPELINE_CATALOG with docs/data/factory-stats.json image_builds['bluefin-next'], populated by a live GitHub Actions workflow-runs query against projectbluefin/bluefin.
